objective: Test a relay-style OpenHands Cloud handoff loop where each conversation completes one bounded repo step and then spawns the next conversation.

steps.title: Write a handoff marker file
acceptance_criteria: Write a short note that step 1 completed in the repo
Update `.openhands/context/last_run.md` and `.openhands/context/next_prompt.md` for the next conversation
steps.last_result: Completed 2026-03-20. Created handoff_step_01.txt, updated context files, spawning next conversation.
